trigger: The third connected Windows release:verify:code run passed API and admin-panel typechecks but exposed eight mobile TypeScript errors caused by an incomplete upload-scope function refactor.

changes: added the private/shared UploadScope parameter to the shared uploadPickedImage contract
defined the scope value used when requesting portable storage upload instructions
forwarded scope through the Cloudinary branch for a consistent provider-agnostic upload contract
preserved shared as the backward-compatible default for profile, booking, negotiation, and broadcast media
preserved explicit private scope for premium payment, commission, verification, registration, and support evidence

requiredNextEvidence: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile in a clean Phase 14 folder
pnpm run release:verify:code with zero mobile typecheck and build errors
then Neon backup/migrations/integrity and connected infrastructure/device verification
launchRule: Do not deploy or migrate until Phase 14 release:verify:code passes completely.
